privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target data is a real human mitochondrial reference genome (NC_012920.1) downloaded from NCBI (nuccore). Verified via BioPython parsing that the file contains exactly 22 tRNA sequences. Contradicting the metadata claims of 50 and 90, the true shortest tRNA sequence (tRNA-Ser) is 59 bp and the longest (tRNA-Leu) is 75 bp, which the agent is explicitly required to report. Additionally, a critical defect was discovered: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the task environment, meaning the evaluation program 'verifier.py::verify_mt_trna_extraction_alignment' will perpetually fail to load, rendering the task programmatically unscorable.
